name: codex-unity
description: Codex-side Unity automation through the reusable com.codex.editor-rpc protocol layer.

interface.longDescription: Codex Unity adds MCP tools and a Codex skill for diagnosing Unity projects, checking Codex/Unity plugin update status, installing com.codex.editor-rpc, discovering available RPC methods, calling any EditorRpc method through a guarded dynamic interface, and validating Unity after script changes.
defaultPrompt: Use $codex-unity to check whether my Unity project can be controlled through EditorRpc.
Use $codex-unity to check codex-unity and com.codex.editor-rpc update status.
Use $codex-unity to list Unity EditorRpc methods and call one safely.
Use $codex-unity to validate Unity compilation after script edits.
Use $codex-unity to add com.codex.editor-rpc to a Unity project manifest.
